market_pulse: EDC Week dominance with headline acts (Tiësto, David Guetta, Four Color Zack) driving peak engagement across top nightclubs; competitors emphasize legacy talent residencies while emerging dayclub OMNIA opens May 15 with new production baseline.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: EDC Week performances at LIV (Tiësto, David Guetta confirmed)
Calvin Harris closing Encore Beach Club tonight (May 16)
Multiple Memorial Day weekend countdowns across Hakkasan, OMNIA, Zouk
High social engagement on EDC-themed content
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize EDC week momentum with real-time social updates; track competitor Memorial Day lineups aggressively; prepare post-EDC recovery content (Monday/Tuesday exclusive sets).

content_gaps.description: BTS bottle service prep and VIP experience storytelling dominant at Encore, OMNIA, Hakkasan but absent from LIV feed
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film 2-3 short BTS reels of LIV bottle service setups, DJ prep, crowd energy 10min before doors; post to Stories with countdown timer

content_gaps.description: EDC week remix packs and festival mashups used across TikTok competitor accounts but not leveraged by LIV
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3x 15-sec video clips using trending EDC festival audio; tag @tiesto, @davidguetta, @joshbaker; post to TT within 2 hours

content_gaps.description: Competitor nightclubs using #hashtag campaigns to amplify attendee posts; LIV not aggregating or reposting UGC during peak events
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #EDCatLIV2026 hashtag campaign; repost 5-8 best UGC clips daily to Stories/Feed; offer raffle entry for tagged posts
